records.m_Talk_ENG: This is about finding a researcher who was working on top secret projects until he disappeared into thin air. This is on a completely different scale than a simple search and rescue.

records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the elevator operation log managed internally by Sirasaki.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the elevator operation log managed internally by Sirasaki.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Elevator 3 moved...? And three months ago at that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Elevator 3 moved...? And three months ago at that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Elevator 3 moved...? And three months ago at that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought it had been decommissioned a long time ago. Sirasaki's still operating it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought it had been decommissioned a long time ago. Sirasaki's still operating it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought it had been decommissioned a long time ago. Sirasaki's still operating it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, the elevator had been abandoned since the disappearance of the Cavendish expedition three years ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, the elevator had been abandoned since the disappearance of the Cavendish expedition three years ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, the elevator had been abandoned since the disappearance of the Cavendish expedition three years ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to the records, an unauthorized expedition tried to repair and use the elevator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to the records, an unauthorized expedition tried to repair and use the elevator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to the records, an unauthorized expedition tried to repair and use the elevator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An expedition team fixing the elevator on their own? Why go so far?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An expedition team fixing the elevator on their own? Why go so far?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An expedition team fixing the elevator on their own? Why go so far?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because only elevator 3 goes down to the 5th floor of the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because only elevator 3 goes down to the 5th floor of the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because only elevator 3 goes down to the 5th floor of the Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Any survivors?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Any survivors?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Any survivors?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not a single one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not a single one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not a single one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The deadline for reporting missing lifters is five days, so they're probably already dead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The deadline for reporting missing lifters is five days, so they're probably already dead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The deadline for reporting missing lifters is five days, so they're probably already dead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who else knows about this incident?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who else knows about this incident?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who else knows about this incident?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We heard that when you were down on the 2nd floor, someone sent a distress signal from the 5th floor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We heard that when you were down on the 2nd floor, someone sent a distress signal from the 5th floor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We heard that when you were down on the 2nd floor, someone sent a distress signal from the 5th floor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So those guys stranded on the 5th floor knew about elevator 3 working.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So those guys stranded on the 5th floor knew about elevator 3 working.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So those guys stranded on the 5th floor knew about elevator 3 working.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly. Elevator 3 was being used multiple times since it got repaired. We just didn't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly. Elevator 3 was being used multiple times since it got repaired. We just didn't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly. Elevator 3 was being used multiple times since it got repaired. We just didn't know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then why are you still willing to go?
